visuals.title: Two-Buffer Scheme Operation
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Two-Buffer Scheme Operation
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Input Buffering</text>

  <!-- Input Source -->
  <rect x="50" y="80" width="80" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Input Source
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow to Buffer -->
  <path d="M135 100 L165 100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="165 100, 160 96, 160 104" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>

  <!-- Buffer -->
  <rect x="170" y="70" width="120" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="230" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Buffer
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Buffer Content -->
  <text x="230" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Data 1 | Data 2 | Data 3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow to Processor -->
  <path d="M295 100 L325 100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="325 100, 320 96, 320 104" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>

  <!-- Processor -->
  <rect x="330" y="80" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="370" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Processor
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Legend -->
  <rect x="50" y="150" width="320" height="80" fill="white" rx="5" stroke="#BBDEFB" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Input Buffering Purpose
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Temporary storage for input data
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Smooths data flow between different speed components
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
